headline: Vertex Extends Pediatric Pipeline As Shares Trade Below Consensus Targets
summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals reported pivotal pediatric data for CASGEVY for young children with severe sickle cell disease and beta thalassemia. The company released positive long term and very early age group results for cystic fibrosis therapies ALYFTREK and TRIKAFTA. Vertex initiated regulatory reviews to expand indications into younger populations across multiple regions. These updates come with Vertex Pharmaceuticals (NasdaqGS:VRTX) shares trading at $445.04 and a value score of 4,...
